fact_check_notes: ABK-Qviller 2026 case study: Øksil volleyball club indoor hall in Øksnes has a 600 m² heated concrete slab, 40 cm Danish sand, and three sandvolleyball courts, with about 18 °C indoor conditions year-round. BookUp listing title confirms Øksilhallen booking page. ØKSIL booking information lists year-round booking and prices/rules. Address supplied by local report: Støveien 24, 8430 Myre. Marker uses nearby verified Støveien sports-hall coordinates from handball.no search result for Øksneshallen (Støveien 20: 68.91808, 15.08535), pending exact public geocode for Støveien 24.
